stories.title: Fix accessibility: heading hierarchy, form labels, image alt text
acceptance_criteria: Single h1 per page, proper h2-h6 nesting in all components
All form inputs have associated <label> or aria-label
TypeScript compiles and all tests pass
stories.context:
The
landmark and skip-to-content link are ALREADY in App.jsx (lines 37-40, 107-112). Focus on: 1. Heading hierarchy: check Hero.jsx, About.jsx, HowItWorks.jsx, Checker.jsx for multiple h1s. Only Hero should have h1, others should use h2+. 2. Form labels: Checker.jsx has a textarea/input — ensure aria-label or

stories.title: Fix responsive CSS overflow at mobile/tablet/desktop
acceptance_criteria: All content fits within viewport width on all pages
TypeScript compiles and all tests pass
stories.context:
App.jsx already has overflow-x-hidden on the container (line 36, 106). Focus on:
1. Check src/ui/src/index.css for any elements wider than viewport (tables, pre, code blocks).
2. Check components that render dynamic content: ContentPost.jsx, ContentList.jsx, Checker.jsx.
3. Add max-w-full, overflow-x-auto to elements that might overflow (tables, code blocks, images).
4. Ensure responsive Tailwind classes exist on all layout containers.
All UI files are in src/ui/src/. Run: npx vitest run after changes.

stories.title: Add Sanity CMS mock for test environment
acceptance_criteria: Sanity API calls return mock data when ENVIRONMENT=test or NODE_ENV=test
Blog, ghid, educatie routes return valid responses in test env
Mock data is realistic (Romanian content, proper schema)
stories.context: src/worker/lib/sanity.ts makes HTTP calls to apicdn.sanity.io which fails in test/local env. A mock data file already exists at src/worker/lib/sanity-mock-data.ts. Check if sanity.ts already has test-mode detection (similar to rate-limiter.ts isTestEnvironment pattern). If not, add it: when isTestEnvironment(env) returns true, return mock data instead of calling Sanity API. The mock should cover the GROQ queries used by blog/ghid/educatie routes. Run: npx vitest run after changes.

stories.title: Add favicon.ico to static assets and HTML
stories.context: A favicon.ico already exists at src/ui/public/favicon.ico. Check dist/index.html for a <link rel='icon'> tag. If missing, add it to the <head>. Also check if wrangler.toml static assets config serves the public/ directory. This is a tiny change. Run: npx vitest run after.
